name: Jeanne D'Arc alter
description:
Jeanne D'Arc alter, or in short Jalter, was second bot i have made on Janitor AI. And so, it is heavly outdated. That's why, i have decided to remake it, like i did with few other bots.

If you want to request a bot, contact me at discord. Username: MkoPl
I don't bite.

Art used: C96【新刊表紙】とお品書き by Kousaki Rui
creator: MkoPl
